feature.title: Sonos just launched 2 new speakers, with some subtle but useful upgrades
feature.summary: Sonos announces the Play and Era 100 SL speakers, giving new and existing customers even more modular options.
feature.short_summary: Sonos 发布了 2 款新喇叭，提供更多模块化选择。

feature.title: I Used Google’s New Gemini-Powered ‘Help Me Create’ Tool in Docs. It’s Great at Corporate-Speak
feature.summary: Google has injected Docs, Drive, Sheets, and Slides with its Gemini assistant, adding new features that can pull information from your emails and the web to help you draft content. I gave it a whirl.
feature.short_summary: 谷歌的文档工具新增了智能助手，可以从邮件和网页中提取信息，帮助你更快地创作内容。

feature.title: New ways to learn math and science in ChatGPT
feature.summary: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time.
feature.short_summary: 现在可以通过互动的图形解释来学习数学和科学，帮助学生实时探索公式、变量和概念。

release.title: When KaOS Linux dropped KDE Plasma, I worried - now I'm loving the new default desktop
release.summary: The rolling release distro switches to Niri, a scrollable, tiling compositor that's a lot cooler than you'd think. See why.
release.short_summary: KaOS Linux 放弃了 KDE Plasma，改用 Niri 桌面环境，结果出乎意料地好。

bugfix.title: I set up a Firawalla Orange router at home, and it's a bigger security upgrade than expected
bugfix.summary: The Firewalla Orange makes network monitoring and security accessible for home setups, small businesses, and more.
bugfix.short_summary: Firewalla Orange 让家庭和小型企业的网络监控和安全变得更加容易。

general.title: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra vs. S26 Ultra: Should you upgrade to the latest model after two years?
general.summary: Wondering how the Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra from 2024 stacks up to the latest Ultra flagship? Here's how the two phones compare.
general.short_summary: 想知道2024年的三星S24 Ultra和最新的Ultra旗舰机型有什么区别？让我们来比较一下这两款手机。

general.title: OpenAI - Videos
general.short_summary: 可以观看视频了解更多信息。

general.title: OpenAI - Live
general.short_summary: 让您随时随地获取信息和答案。
